title: Argentinian Chicken Liver Pâté
description: A rich and flavorful solo-dinner featuring chicken liver, served with crusty bread for dipping. This dish is a twist on the classic Argentinian culinary tradition, perfect for a low-fat friendly meal.

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher salt for best flavor

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic and sauté until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chili flakes and oregano and sauté for 1 minute more.
Add the chicken livers and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the red wine vinegar and cook until the liquid has almost completely evaporated, about 2 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
Transfer the mixture to a food processor and puree until smooth.
Transfer the pâté to a serving bowl and garnish with chopped parsley and cilantro.
Serve with crusty bread for dipping.
